title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: They translated the novel into twelve languages.

questions.firstSentence: It would be a good idea to see a doctor.
John's flat is bigger than mine.
The weather was so beautiful that we had a picnic.
questions.secondSentence: It was (1) _________ that we had a picnic.

questions.firstSentence: She was obliged to retake the exam.
He doesn't play video games any more.
The journalist reported that a fire had broken out.
